expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度]是整体测量值，[板厚]是顶部、底部和侧面的板材厚度，[背景板厚度]是背景板的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของบอร์ดสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุบอร์ดบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุของบอร์ดด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván Nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa cabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal sa Tuktok, Ibaba, at Gilid na Boards, ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales ng likod ng Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်အတွက်ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားများအားတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှု ဖြစ်ပြီး [BoardThick] သည် အပေါ်၊ အောက်နှင့် ချောင်းဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူ ဖြစ်သည်။ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူ ဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាតួបន្ទះសម្រាប់ទូ។ [ទទឹង], [កម្ពស់], [ជម្រៅ] ជាឧប្បកិច្ចការវាស់ទំហំសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាប្រភេទវត្ថុធាតុតឹងរាងត្របត់បាតនិងចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាប្រភេទវត្ថុធាតុទំពក់ដែលមានកំដៅ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຂອງຄອດສໍາລັບຕູ້ລາງຊື່ທັງໝົດ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂໍ້ມູນທີ່ວັດເອົາ,[BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຜ່ານຂອງຄອດຂອງວັດສະດຸ,[BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຜ່ານສະຕູບາງ.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネット用の板サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は総寸法、[BoardThick]は上部、下部、側部ボード材厚、[BackBoardThick]は背面ボード材厚です。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 측정, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재질 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 뒷판 재질 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tableros para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de los tableros superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les mesures totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Brettgrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Bretter, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke des Rückbretts. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकारों की गणना करें। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры панелей для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала верхних, нижних и боковых панелей, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
